app.title: linux-helper
catalog.help: up/down move, enter open, ctrl+l locale, ctrl+t theme, esc back, ctrl+c quit
detail.run: Press enter to fill fields and run
detail.favorite_on: Press ctrl+f to remove from favorites
detail.favorite_off: Press ctrl+f to add to favorites
form.submit: Press enter or ctrl+s to continue
confirm.title: Confirmation required
result.cancel: Press esc to stop and go back
result.scroll: Use up/down or pgup/pgdn to scroll
result.back: Press enter or esc to return
